title: Second Ilthmar Defense
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Second Ilthmar Defense''' was a move used in [[Dejarik/Legends|dejarik]] and [[Chess/Legends|chess]].

==Behind the scenes==
Ilthmar is a city in Fritz Leiber's sword-and-sorcery series featuring the characters ''Fafhrd & Grey Mouser''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|''Han Solo at Stars' End'' comic]]
